title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: This is a profile of Corgi, an insurance platform co-founded by Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, which rebuilt the trillion-dollar insurance industry from the ground up rather than modernizing legacy carriers. The founders raised $108M in Series A funding and are projected to reach several hundred million in ARR by pursuing the most ambitious version of their vision and treating regulatory difficulty as a moat builder.
